title: cordylanthus kingii var. helleri
intro: Cordylanthus kingii var. helleri, also known as Heller's bird's beak, is a perennial plant species native to the coastal mountain ranges of California and Oregon. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and congestion. Cordylanthus kingii var. helleri can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
